metadata.title: Andamus — Carpooling in Sardinia
metadata.description: Find and offer rides all over Sardinia. Save on travel, meet new people and cut emissions with Sardinia's own carpooling community.

home.heroDescription: Find or offer a ride anywhere on the island. Save money, travel together and cut emissions.
home.noRidesToday: No rides on this route today. Publish yours!
home.headline: Rides in Sardinia.
home.description: Find or offer a ride anywhere in Sardinia. Simple, direct, shared.

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.description: Sign up free in seconds, even with your Google account.

step2.title: Find or offer a ride
step2.description: Find someone going your way, or publish the free seats in your car.

step3.title: Book and go
step3.description: Arrange the details in chat and travel together, splitting the costs.

events.title: Events in Sardinia

home.feature3Description: Talk directly with the driver and passengers, no middlemen.

home.ctaDescription: Publish a ride and split travel costs.

onboarding.subtitle: Complete these simple steps to get the best start with carpooling in Sardinia

modal.welcomeToast: Welcome to Andamus! 🎉 Start finding rides in Sardinia.

slides.title: Sardinia's carpooling 🚗
slides.description: Welcome to Andamus, the app for people who live and travel in Sardinia. Share rides, save on travel and cut emissions.

slides.title: Find a ride
slides.description: Search rides all over Sardinia and filter by date, price and city. Book in a few taps and get confirmation straight from the driver.

slides.title: Offer a ride
slides.description: Got free seats in your car? Publish your ride in under a minute and split travel costs with passengers.

slides.title: Chat and safety
slides.description: Arrange everything in the built-in chat. And in an emergency, the SOS button calls 112 in one second.

slides.title: Community and points
slides.description: Join a trusted community: earn points, unlock levels and build your reputation with genuine reviews.

slides.title: All set! 🎉
slides.description: Find a ride right away or publish your first trip. Together we make Sardinia more connected and sustainable.

badges.completeActionsToUnlock: Complete the actions to unlock badges!

rating.fiveStarPoints: The driver earned +{points} points for the 5-star review! ⭐
rating.alreadyReviewedMessage: You've already left a review for this ride.

safety.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation not supported by the browser
safety.locationCopied: Location copied! Paste it and send it to your trusted contacts
safety.locationError: Unable to get your location. Check permissions.
safety.tip1: Always share your trip details with someone
safety.tip2: Check profiles and reviews before you leave
safety.emergencyDescription: If you're in danger, call 112 right away or share your location.

footer.tagline: Sardinian carpooling for travelling together. We connect people to share rides all over Sardinia.
footer.shareText: 🚗 Discover Andamus, Sardinia's carpooling! Find and offer rides all over the island. Free and made for the people who live here. https://andamus.it
footer.copySuccess: Link copied! Paste it wherever you like
